speaker: speaker1
text: Where should we go eat today ?

speaker: speaker2
text: How about we go eat in the cafeteria ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I never bought food from the cafeteria .

speaker: speaker2
text: You haven't ? They have a lot of good stuff .

speaker: speaker2
text: I've gotten chow mein from there before .

speaker: speaker1
text: I guess we can eat there then .

speaker: speaker2
text: Trust me , the food isn't half bad .
